text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Gold City's debut race, and she's
approached by reporters eager to know her
future plans. Some are hoping she'll run in the
Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Gold City wants them to concentrate on
her running, they appear fixated on her looks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frustrated to only be appreciated for her physical
appearance, she seems desperate to prove
through her race results that there's more to her
than looks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her to run like herself, but she dismisses my
advice as "a given" as she walks off to the starting
gate.
